## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Each criterion from the issue is answered.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] Tests cover behavior changes.
- [ ] Applicable documentation is updated.
- [ ] No unapproved dependency was added.
- [ ] Limitations and unperformed work are declared.

## Agent declaration

- [ ] The agent stopped at the assigned issue boundary.
